title: test helpers: fix issues in test helper functions
description: Review and fix test helper functions for correctness and style. Update affected files, test.
notes: Simplified test_fail_next_* helpers in app_interface.c: removed redundant ternary (now direct assignment; was no-op after non-zero fix). Audited kiss_transport_test_reset, slip_transport_test_reset, ble_app_owner_test_reset, gateway_meshcore_adapter_test_reset and meshtastic/gateway test helpers for lock ordering, error handling, stack usage, uninit vars. All follow consistent single-or-ordered mutex patterns; no VLAs, no Y2K38, no truncation in helpers. No additional P0-P2 issues found. Ran lichen/tests/app_interface (12/12), lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter (full suite pass), kiss_transport test, ble_app_owner test. 3 independent codereview passes (no findings after fix). Style and correctness improved.
close_reason: Fixed per RULE with 3 parallel codereview passes each, idiomatic C11/no_std changes, no test modifications, vector matching verified where applicable, quality gates and bd doctor passed
